title: SessionBrief
description: Brain -> Runner. The persona-scoped memory view + ranked open threads. This is GUIDANCE the runner is free to deviate from, NOT a script. Replaces the old fixed questionnaire. On a cold start it carries no threads — only the generic discovery openers. See docs/02-technical-approach.md §5.

cold_start.description: True on first-ever session (empty brain): no threads, only generic openers.

persona_summary.description: The persona's evolving understanding so far.

open_threads.description: Ranked threads to pull on. Empty when cold_start is true.

goal.description: What understanding this thread is meant to close.

why.description: Why it matters now (e.g., single-source pain point, cross-persona corroboration).

suggested_opener.description: Scaffolding the runner may reword, not rails.

reserve_threads.description: Lower-priority thread ids held in reserve.
